description_long: This rifle features a modern, tactical design with a predominantly black and orange color scheme. The body is composed of angular, geometric panels with a robust stock and a prominent barrel shroud. A compact optical sight is mounted on the top rail, and the rifle includes a pistol grip and a trigger guard for ergonomic handling. The magazine appears integrated into the lower receiver, and the fore-end is vented for heat dissipation. The muzzle is fitted with a device that may function as a compensator or brake, and the overall build suggests a weapon designed for urban tactical scenarios.
description: A modern black and orange tactical rifle with a compact sight, vented fore-end, and robust stock, designed for urban use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the muzzle device, barrel opening, and the symmetrical, angular design of the fore-end.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the optical sight, pistol grip, stock, and the detailed venting along the fore-end.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the stock, rear sight alignment, and the overall width of the rifle's body.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the sight, grip, and the magazine area, mirroring the details of the other side.
